text: Apps/platforms removing features without explanation or consistency (like repost button disappearing from some accounts but not others)
Technical glitches in devices/apps that disrupt daily usage
Poor compatibility between new accessories and older devices (like cases blocking ports, speakers not working with specific setups)
Seamless, reliable app/device performance without unexpected changes or glitches
Easy setup and wireless convenience in accessories and devices
Frustration with disappearing app features (like repost button) without explanation
Anxiety about potential censorship or algorithmic control limiting expression
Inconvenience from products not fitting devices properly (e.g., mounts, cases)
Reliable and consistent app functionality with clear communication on changes
Ability to freely share and repost content for awareness or personal expression
Service termination due to opaque 'excessive use' policies with no clear recourse
Inadequate customer support channels (no phone support, only online chat)
Loss of paid service time and money upon termination
Clear, transparent terms of service and usage limits
Accessible, multi-channel customer support
Platform glitches prevent content from being seen (videos stuck at 0 views, in review for hours)
Being locked out of account without ability to verify or log in
Inability to comment or interact normally due to app issues
Content performs as expected (gets views, engagement, pushes to feed)
Reliable, uninterrupted access to account and platform features
Frustration with accidental reposting due to poor UI/button placement
Annoyance with unnecessary features being added that clutter the experience
Frustration with apps becoming less elegant/usable over time due to constant changes
Simple, focused apps that do one thing well without unnecessary extras
Reliable performance across multiple devices and operating systems
Unreliable functionality (randomly stops working)
Bugs in recent updates causing feature loss (e.g., 'Fit to keyboard' removal)
Gestures interfere with other system functions (e.g., edge navigation blocking)
Complete customization of gesture shortcuts (apps, tools, modes)
Smooth, reliable, and consistent gesture performance
Bluetooth connection instability requiring frequent repair/reconnection
Keyboard functionality locked behind paywall or perceived as unfair monetization
Cannot use on device lock screen
Reliable, instant Bluetooth connection without frequent repair
Control PC/media from bed/couch/another room without dedicated peripherals
Limited number of customizable shortcuts and gestures
Specific desired shortcuts missing (e.g., rotate screen on/off)
Feature regression or removal after updates causing frustration (e.g., smart select, virtual trackpad behavior)
More shortcut and gesture customization options
Smooth, consistent, and configurable animations
Eye strain, headaches, and difficulty sleeping from phone screen use, especially at night
Existing phone blue light filters are limited or absent
App unpredictably stops working, requires troubleshooting, or conflicts with system settings
Reduce eye strain, headaches, and improve sleep quality
Customizable, adjustable filter for brightness, color temperature, and intensity
Bluetooth connection unreliable, frequently disconnects or fails to connect
Latency and lag make mouse cursor jumpy or unresponsive
Complex or buggy setup process requiring repeated re-pairing
Reliable, seamless Bluetooth connection without manual re-pairing
Low-latency, precise mouse cursor movement (air mouse functionality)
Another subscription? I need to see if this actually has enough content to justify the cost, especially since my last streaming app barely had anything worth watching.
Okay, this has good ratings, but I need to check if anyone with my phone model is reporting crashes - I'm not going through that headache again.
This navigation is already annoying me and I haven't even tried to find what I need yet. If I have to scroll through pages of stuff just to get to basic features, I'm out.
They want my email just to see pricing? That's exactly the kind of thing that makes me think they're hiding something expensive.
Finally, an app that actually does what it says it will do. No crashes, connects to my earbuds right away, and when I had a question they actually responded within a day.
